title: chore(deps): update dependency setuptools to v68
body:
[![Mend Renovate](https://app.renovatebot.com/images/banner.svg)](https://renovatebot.com)

This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Change | Age | Adoption | Passing | Confidence |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| [setuptools](https://togithub.com/pypa/setuptools) ([changelog](https://setuptools.pypa.io/en/stable/history.html)) | `~=67.8.0` -> `~=68.0.0` | [![age](https://badges.renovateapi.com/packages/pypi/setuptools/68.0.0/age-slim)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![adoption](https://badges.renovateapi.com/packages/pypi/setuptools/68.0.0/adoption-slim)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![passing](https://badges.renovateapi.com/packages/pypi/setuptools/68.0.0/compatibility-slim/67.8.0)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![confidence](https://badges.renovateapi.com/packages/pypi/setuptools/68.0.0/confidence-slim/67.8.0)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>pypa/setuptools</summary>

### [`v68.0.0`](https://togithub.com/pypa/setuptools/blob/HEAD/CHANGES.rst#v6800)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/pypa/setuptools/compare/v67.8.0...v68.0.0)

Breaking Changes
^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

-   [#​3948](https://togithub.com/pypa/setuptools/issues/3948): Removed verification for existing `depends.txt` file (deprecated since v0.5a4).
-   [#​3948](https://togithub.com/pypa/setuptools/issues/3948): Remove autofixing of broken `.egg-info` directories containing the `-`
    character in their base name (without suffix).
    They should no longer be produced by sufficiently new versions of `setuptools`
    (warning introduced in 2005).
-   [#​3948](https://togithub.com/pypa/setuptools/issues/3948): Remove deprecated APIs in `easy_install`: `get_script_args`,
    `get_script_header` and `get_writer`.
    The direct usage of `easy_install` has been deprecated since v58.3.0,
    and the warnings regarding these APIs predate that version.
-   [#​3948](https://togithub.com/pypa/setuptools/issues/3948): Removed `egg_info.get_pkg_info_revision` (deprecated since 2015).
-   [#​3948](https://togithub.com/pypa/setuptools/issues/3948): Removed `setuptools.dist._get_unpatched` (deprecated since 2016)
-   [#​3948](https://togithub.com/pypa/setuptools/issues/3948): Removed support for SVN in `setuptools.package_index` (deprecated since 2018).
-   [#​3948](https://togithub.com/pypa/setuptools/issues/3948): Removed support for invalid `pyproject.toml` files.
    During the implementation of PEP 621, it was identified that some users were
    producing invalid files. As a transitional measure, the validation was relaxed
    for a few use cases. The grace period, however, came to an end.

Changes
^^^^^^^

-   [#​3760](https://togithub.com/pypa/setuptools/issues/3760): Added symlink support to launcher for installed executables -- by :user:`eugene-sevostianov-sc`
-   [#​3926](https://togithub.com/pypa/setuptools/issues/3926): Updated vendored `packaging` version from 23.0 to 23.1 -- by :user:`MetRonnie`
-   [#​3950](https://togithub.com/pypa/setuptools/issues/3950): Implemented workaround for old versions of `vswhere`, which miss the
    `-requiresAny` parameter, such as the ones distributed together with Visual Studio 2017 < 15.6.
-   [#​3952](https://togithub.com/pypa/setuptools/issues/3952): Changed `DistutilsMetaFinder` to skip `spec_for_pip` on Python >= 3.12.
-   [#​3952](https://togithub.com/pypa/setuptools/issues/3952): Removed `_distutils_hack.remove_shim` on Python >= 3.12
    (since `distutils` was removed from the standard library,
    `DistutilsMetaFinder` cannot be disabled on Python >= 3.12).

Misc
^^^^

-   [#​3920](https://togithub.com/pypa/setuptools/issues/3920): Add a link to deprecation warning in `pkg_resources` and improve
    `stacklevel` for better visibility.

</details>

---
